name: Mirana
description: Princess of the Moon, Mirana prowls the Nightsilver Woods searching for poachers and uses her celestial abilities to protect Selemene's preserve.

abilities.name: Celestial Quiver
abilities.description: Infuses the next successful attack with magical attack damage bonus. Grants temporary Celestial Quiver charges upon landing with Leap. Cast Range: 630. Magical Attack Damage Bonus: 5 (45). Magical Attack Damage Bonus Increase: 3. Additional Charges: (2). Cooldown: 2/3/4/5/6. Mana Cost: 0.

abilities.name: Starstorm
abilities.description: Calls down a meteor wave to damage all enemy units within the radius. The nearest enemy unit to Mirana within the secondary radius will be stuck a second time for a portion of the damage. Effect Radius: 675. Damage: 75/150/225/300 (275/350/425/500). Search Radius: 675. Secondary Meteor Damage Factor: 0.7. Cooldown: 80/90/100/110.

abilities.name: Sacred Arrow
abilities.description: Fires a long-range arrow that stuns and damages the first enemy unit it impacts. The launched primary Sacred Arrow calls forth a Starstorm meteor projectiles of its corresponding level on all enemy units along the travel path. Upon impact, it calls a secondary meteor that deals a portion of its damage to the impacted enemy unit. Cast Range: 3000. Max Travel Distance: 3067. Arrow Collision Radius: 96. Number of Arrows: 1 (3). Base Damage: 60/150/240/330. Max Ability Power Distance: 1500. Cooldown: 19/18/17/16. Mana Cost: 90.

abilities.name: Leap
abilities.description: None can fail to recognize Mirana's iconic white beast in the heat of battle. Leap Distance: 650 (800). Move Speed Bonus: 6%/12%/18%/24%. Attack Speed Bonus: 25/50/75/100 (115/140/165/190). Duration: 5. Crit Damage: (150%). Cooldown: 45/35/25/15. Mana Cost: 2.

abilities.name: Moonlight Shadow
abilities.description: The buff additionally and independently grants evasion bonus. Radius: Global Fade. Damage Amp: 9%/12%/15%. Move Speed Bonus: 9%/12%/15%. Duration: 18. Radius: Global. Cooldown: 140/120/100. Mana Cost: 125.
